intro: Alsinanthus cucubaloides, also known as the Cuckoo Flower, is a perennial plant of the Papaveraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Alsinanthus cucubaloides include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
